title: 2025-09-10 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 2.55
description: Daily pressure check for 2025-09-10: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 2.55/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and equity stress shaped the daily read. Includes charts, a component breakdown, and a narrative summary.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2025-09-10, the score printed 2.55/100 in the low regime, with volatility and equity stress doing most of the work.
